data.title: D-Wave Quantum Shares Are Up Today: What's Going On?
data.description: Shares of D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE: QBTS) are trading higher Friday following recent developments across the quantum computing sector, driven in part by announcements from major companies and growing recognition of quantum computing's potential economic impact. Here's what you need to know.

data.title: Ubisoft Stock Jumps 14% After Reports Of Tencent Buyout
data.description: Ubisoft is in talks with Tencent for a possible buyout that could take the company private and reshape its future.

data.title: Europe Says Thanks But We'll Do It Ourselves - Canada Leads In Raw Cannabis Exports, Not Oil
data.description: While dried flower exports have flourished, the growth of Canada's cannabis extracts, including oils and vapes, has been more erratic.
